security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self' data:;
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' http://localhost:5173; img-src 'self' data: asset:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:5173 ws://localhost:5173; font-src 'self' data:;

bundle.longDescription: Aplicativo desktop para controle financeiro pessoal com importacao automatica de OFX/XLS/XLSX.
